mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sal_sheet ( employee_id, month, base_salary, perf_salary, subsidy, overtime_pay, total_income, social_insurance, tax, total_deduction, net_salary, status, deleted, field_values, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{month}, #{baseSalary}, #{perfSalary}, #{subsidy}, #{overtimePay}, #{totalIncome}, #{socialInsurance}, #{tax}, #{totalDeduction}, #{netSalary}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{fieldValues}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sal_sheet SET base_salary = #{baseSalary}, perf_salary = #{perfSalary}, subsidy = #{subsidy}, overtime_pay = #{overtimePay}, total_income = #{totalIncome}, social_insurance = #{socialInsurance}, tax = #{tax}, total_deduction = #{totalDeduction}, net_salary = #{netSalary}, status = #{status}, deleted = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND month = #{month}
